sendOnEnter.label: Send on Enter key
sendOnEnter.enabled: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
sendOnEnter.disabled: Press Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to send, Enter for new line

includeMetadataInCopy.label: Include message metadata when copying
includeMetadataInCopy.description: Include timestamp and message number when copying messages

includeMetadataInDownload.label: Include message metadata when downloading/exporting
includeMetadataInDownload.description: Include timestamp and message number when downloading/exporting messages

useHeti.label: Use heti typography
useHeti.description: Use heti typography for more beautiful Chinese text layout

showDeleteConfirmation.label: Show delete confirmation
showDeleteConfirmation.description: Show a confirmation dialog when deleting

autoScroll.label: Always track latest message
autoScroll.description: Auto-scroll to bottom when new messages arrive, like an IM chat

editorFontSize.label: Editor Font Size
editorFontSize.description: Adjust the font size of the Markdown editor (4-64px)

toolbarButtonSize.label: Toolbar Button Size
toolbarButtonSize.description: Adjust the size of editor toolbar buttons (20-36px)

messageFontSize.label: Message Font Size
messageFontSize.description: Adjust the font size of chat messages (4-64px)
